title: aphanactis breviligulata
intro: Aphanactis breviligulata, also known as the Short-pigmented Aphanactis, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aphanactis breviligulata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to be effective in harnessing its medicinal properties.
